titleStmt.title: SII 5.1181: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1181. (A.R. No. 300 of 1896). ON THE ELEVENTH PILLAR IN THE SAME MANDAPA, EAST FACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē rāmata¨rkkadvimaṇiparimitē kuṁbhakṛṣṇe
daśamyāṁ vārē kāvyē ca lagnēbhijiti samucitē kū¨rmmanātha
syadhūpē . prādādāsū¨ryyacaṁdraṁ dvayasahitadaśasva¨rṇna
niṣkaṁ vibhūtyai gānā¨rtthaṁ pōlasūnuḥ pradhitadaḷapa
ti[¨r*]dvāradēśē ca nityaṁ . 1 . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1263 guṁnnēṭṭi
pratāpa śrīvīranaranārasiṁhyadēva vijayarājyasaṁ
vatsaraṁbulu 18 śrāhini kuṁba kṛṣṇa daśami śukravārā
na śrīkū¨rmmanādhuni saṁnidhini Ubhayadhūpālayaṁdu
cittaradvāranilayamaṁdu koluvanu kattulakūnapanā
yakuniki Allāḍapaḍirāyani koḍuku nārāyaṇadaḷa
patiṁgāru tamaku Āyuṣkāmyā¨rttha phalasiddhigānu cēśina
dattamu Iddumukūṭikini gaṁḍamāḍalu 8 Appamu Okkaṁ
ṭṭiki mā 2 viḍyālureṁṭṭiki mā 2 gā mā 12 Istimi . Ī pa
hiḍikinni Ī kūṭiki [A]ppānaku Ī viḍyālakunnu kattu
lakūnapanāyakuṁḍu ka¨rtta . Alāḍapaḍirāya
ni koḍku nārāyaṇadaḷapativaṁśamaṁdu puṭinavāri
cēta cēśuṁḍi Ī pahiṁḍi Aḍugapaḍayadu Ī A¨rttha
munaku caṁdrasū¨ryyulu sākṣulu Ī dha¨rmmānaku
tirupati śrīvaiṣṇamarakṣa . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 5.1181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
